title: Natural England Action Plan 2025 to 2026
body: "The plan outlines how we will deliver against the 6 strategic priorities set out in our strategic direction:   Drive Nature recovery at a greater scale and faster pace. Tackle the root causes of Nature’s decline. Partner with planners and developers. Support food security and sustainable farming, forestry, and fishing. Shape better places for people to work and live. Connect communities with Nature.  "
